packName: Business Corporate Social Media Post Canva
normalizationSummary: Convert the six-slide corporate carousel into reusable business education, service explainer, and company positioning templates.
whyNow: This is one of the strongest imported business packs and should become a flagship non-real-estate template family.

candidateTemplates.name: Corporate Carousel Educational
candidateTemplates.contentGoal: Teach a topic over multiple slides in a polished corporate format.
candidateTemplates.rationale: Broadly reusable for consultants, agencies, service brands, and B2B businesses.
candidateTemplates.notes: Treat as a carousel family rather than a single-slide post.

candidateTemplates.name: Corporate Carousel Services
candidateTemplates.contentGoal: Showcase services, process, differentiators, or package details.
candidateTemplates.rationale: Easy fit for small business sales and service education.
